systems.name: Player Vitals

systems.content_note: In-code DEFAULT constants only (DEFAULT_HEALTH_DRAIN=0.0; passive health drain is zero, only context drains bite). vitals_state.configure is called once at 6959 with an empty dict (reload-reset path); line 1163 is the .new() instantiation, NOT a configure call as the original entry implied. loops.name: Survival vitals attrition
break_points: CORRECTED: the vitals sink is NOT purely HUD - health<25 derives vitals_critical (5482-5487) which drives the CRITICAL music FSM (5493), SFX_SUIT_BREATH (5504) and a UI_VITALS_LOW edge alert (5507), so there is a live audio consequence. BUT there is still no terminal stake: end_run('death') (1488) is defined and never called (grep confirms zero callers), no health<=0 death/incapacitation check exists, and no sprint/action gating reads vitals - so attrition never produces a gameplay failure/consequence. Loop grade stays broken.

radiation_state.tick (4884), body_temperature_state.tick (4887) and status_effects_state.tick (4889) all run only in the home branch after the away-branch early-return at line 4808, so on a boarded derelict (the primary context) they never advance

body_temperature_state.in_extreme_zone=away_from_start is assigned at 4886 inside the home branch where away_from_start is always false, so the extreme-zone source never activates (temperature->thirst coupling permanently neutral 1.0)

loops.name: Sanity to hallucination feedback
break_points: Closes as a cause/effect chain (sanity drains -> director schedules -> manager renders phantoms -> player wastes ammo to dissipate via attack path 3890 + tier-3 drains health), wired into BOTH _process branches (away 4760-4774, home 4864-4879); verified accurate. Caveat: the terminal vitals health drain feeds a sink with an audio consequence but no death/incapacitation consumer (see survival_vitals)

loops.name: Food / Sustenance Loop

steps.role: acquire (craft/loot food, registered for spoilage via _register_food_for_spoilage at 3137/3156/3313)
register + age tracked food (home-branch tick only)

break_points: Production half is fully dead: hydroponics_state.plant()/harvest(), synthesizer_state.start_synthesis(), and water_recycler_state.load_input() have NO runtime callers (verified by repo-wide grep — only validation smokes call them); none of the three ever produces food/water.

Away-branch early-return (playable_generated_ship.gd:4808) means the food tick block (4891-4898) and the sustenance/recycler reads (1359, 1390-1394, inside _recompute_expanded_ship_systems called only at 4817) run at home only; food does not spoil on a derelict, the primary gameplay context.
water_recycler output is wired into life_support (1359) but always 0 because input is never loaded.

sustenance_state (omitted from the proposed inventory) ticks live at 1390 but is a read-only HUD/save roll-up of the three dead stations — its harvest/meal/water-ready counts have no consumer that grants items, so it adds no closure.

The eat half (loot/craft -> spoilage -> eat -> vitals/sanity) does close end-to-end and is the only live part of the loop; the eat input path runs in both home and away, though spoilage aging itself does not advance away.

loops.name: Save / Load / Persistence
break_points: The multi-slot LOAD path (load_from_slot) has NO live caller: request_load uses load_world (world.json) only, and SaveLoadMenu.select_slot_for_load (the one route to load_from_slot) is never dispatched. So the WRITE half of the loop (autosave_a/b/c + manual slot_01..06 + cloud manifest + slot index) persists, but those slots can only be READ by smokes — the live loop closes solely through the world.json checkpoint.
Permadeath sub-loop is hollow AND doubly dead: record_death has no live caller (player death never freezes a slot), and its only consume site (load_from_slot:249) is itself never live-reached.
No boot-time auto-resume: request_load is manual (F9 / load_run input at 7065-7066).
Cloud manifest sync is a stub (cloud_provider='stub'); the local sha-tamper gate is written live but its read side (load_from_slot:289-302) is never live-reached.
quicksave guards (AutosavePolicy.try_quicksave + SaveLoadMenu.confirm_quicksave) are unwired — no keybinding/UI fires them.
SaveLoadMenu is live for display (refresh/list_slots) but its load/save/delete dispatch methods have no live caller.
